title: momordica glabra
intro: Momordica glabra, also known as the smooth-fruited Momordica, is a plant species in the Cucurbitaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Momordica glabra include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and managing diabetes; its extracts have also been shown to have antiviral and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Momordica glabra, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
